SELinux boolean                State  Default Description

httpd_can_network_connect      (on   ,   off)  Allow httpd to make outbound network connections
virt_use_nfs                   (on   ,   off)  Allow virt to use nfs
samba_enable_home_dirs          (on   ,   on)  Allow samba to enable home dirs
container_manage_cgroup        (off  ,   on)  Allow container to manage cgroup
